title: Poppy
writer: Daisuke Itô, Sôseki Natsume, Haruo Takayanagi
actors: Daijirô Natsukawa, Ichirô Tsukida, Chiyoko Ôkura
plot: Based on Soseki Natsume's 1908 novel of the same title, Poppy is an ornately complicated story of desire and ambition. Fujio is beautiful, talented, well-heeled, and engaged to Munechika, a rising young diplomat. She has promised ...
